fields.label: Netto Plus session bundle
fields.description: Absolute path to a JSON bundle captured from the Netto Plus Android receipt flow.

fields.label: Store label
fields.description: Optional display name override for imported Netto Plus receipts.

fields.label: Plugin state path
fields.description: Optional persistent path for the imported Netto Plus bundle state.

fields.label: Fixture bundle
fields.description: Optional offline fixture bundle for automated tests.

onboarding.title: Import an Android-backed Netto Plus session bundle
onboarding.summary: Netto Plus receipts are app-backed. Desktop setup imports a JSON session bundle captured from the Android receipt flow, then sync reads the cached Netto receipt payloads from that bundle.
onboarding.expected_speed: Usually quick once the bundle file exists. The first sync mainly parses the receipt PDF payloads already captured from the app flow.
onboarding.caution: This connector targets the Edeka-linked Netto Plus product at netto-online.de, not netto.de.

steps.title: Enable the connector
steps.description: Turn on the imported Netto Plus pack after adding it to the desktop app.

steps.title: Choose the session bundle file
steps.description: Use Set up and point the connector at a Netto Plus Android session bundle JSON file.

steps.title: Run sync
steps.description: After the bundle import succeeds, sync will import the captured Netto receipts into desktop.
